goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'stevenage' and should 'arrive by 13:15'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'friday'.
Make sure you get 'departure time', 'train ID', and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'south' and should be in the type of 'park'.
Make sure you get 'postcode', 'entrance fee', and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to stevenage and should arrive by 13:15
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on friday
Make sure you get departure time, train ID, and travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the south and should be in the type of park
Make sure you get postcode, entrance fee, and address
